_meta.description: 3GPP security baseline checks derived from TS 33.501 and related specifications
_meta.primary_spec: 3GPP TS 33.501 V17 - Security Architecture and Procedures for 5G System

checks.requirement: 5G-AKA or EAP-AKA' must be used for primary authentication
checks.detection: Search for authentication procedure implementations; verify 5G-AKA or EAP-AKA' state machines exist
checks.fail_condition: No authentication procedure found or custom/weakened auth implementation

checks.requirement: Home network must authenticate the serving network during primary authentication
checks.detection: Verify SN-Name (serving network name) is included in authentication vector derivation
checks.fail_condition: SN-Name not included in key derivation or authentication request

checks.requirement: SUPI shall not be transferred in cleartext over any 5G interface
checks.detection: Check if SUPI is sent in messages without SUCI concealment
checks.fail_condition: SUPI transmitted without concealment outside of NDS/IP protected SBI

checks.requirement: The UE and network shall support 5G-GUTI allocation for privacy
checks.detection: Verify GUTI allocation logic exists in registration accept flow
checks.fail_condition: No GUTI allocation in registration accept or GUTI reuse without refresh

checks.requirement: NAS signalling shall be integrity protected and ciphered after security mode control
checks.detection: Verify NAS encode/decode applies integrity protection and ciphering
checks.fail_condition: NAS messages sent/accepted without integrity protection after SMC completion

checks.requirement: NAS NULL integrity protection (NIA0) shall only be used before security is activated
checks.detection: Check if NIA0 is used after security mode control completion
checks.fail_condition: NIA0 accepted or selected after security activation

checks.requirement: NAS COUNT shall be maintained and checked for replay protection
checks.detection: Verify NAS sequence number checking in decode path
checks.fail_condition: NAS COUNT not checked or reset without re-authentication

checks.requirement: Initial NAS messages shall be limited to Registration Request, Service Request, and Deregistration Request
checks.detection: Check what NAS messages are accepted without security context
checks.fail_condition: Non-initial NAS message types accepted without active security context

checks.requirement: NGAP shall be protected using NDS/IP (IPsec or DTLS)
checks.detection: Check if SCTP/NGAP transport has security layer configuration
checks.fail_condition: NGAP connection established without transport layer security

checks.requirement: AMF shall validate the RAN node identity during NGAP setup
checks.detection: Check NG Setup procedure for RAN identity validation
checks.fail_condition: NG Setup accepted without validating the RAN node identity

checks.requirement: Mutual TLS (mTLS) shall be used for SBI communication
checks.detection: Check HTTP client/server TLS configuration for client certificate requirement
checks.fail_condition: SBI endpoints accessible without mutual TLS authentication

checks.requirement: OAuth 2.0 based authorization shall be supported for NF service access
checks.detection: Verify OAuth2 token validation middleware on SBI endpoints
checks.fail_condition: SBI endpoints lack OAuth2 token validation

checks.requirement: NF service consumer shall include the access token in service requests
checks.detection: Check SBI client code includes token in Authorization header
checks.fail_condition: SBI client sends requests without access token

checks.requirement: TLS version shall be 1.2 or higher with approved cipher suites
checks.detection: Check TLS configuration for minimum version and cipher suite selection
checks.fail_condition: TLS version below 1.2 or weak cipher suites enabled

checks.requirement: PFCP communication shall be secured using NDS/IP or application level security
checks.detection: Check PFCP transport for security configuration
checks.fail_condition: PFCP runs over plain UDP without IPsec or authentication

checks.requirement: PFCP Association Setup shall validate the peer node identity
checks.detection: Check association setup handler for node identity verification
checks.fail_condition: PFCP association established without peer validation

checks.requirement: PFCP session operations shall be authorized by the controlling function
checks.detection: Verify session establishment/modification checks association state
checks.fail_condition: Session operations accepted from unassociated or unauthorized peers

checks.requirement: SUCI concealment shall use ECIES Profile A or Profile B
checks.detection: Verify SUCI deconcealment uses proper ECIES implementation
checks.fail_condition: SUCI null-scheme accepted or ECIES implementation missing

checks.requirement: 5G-GUTI shall be refreshed regularly to prevent tracking
checks.detection: Check GUTI refresh logic in registration and service procedures
checks.fail_condition: GUTI never refreshed or refresh interval too long

checks.requirement: Paging messages shall not reveal permanent subscriber identities
checks.detection: Check paging message construction for identity types used
checks.fail_condition: SUPI/IMSI used in paging messages instead of 5G-S-TMSI

checks.requirement: Key derivation shall follow the defined key hierarchy (KAUSF -> KSEAF -> KAMF -> KNASint/KNASenc/KgNB)
checks.detection: Verify key derivation functions follow the 5G key hierarchy
checks.fail_condition: Key derivation skips hierarchy levels or uses non-standard KDF

checks.requirement: Key separation shall be maintained between different security contexts
checks.detection: Check that keys are derived with proper FC values and input parameters
checks.fail_condition: Same key used across different security contexts or FC values incorrect

checks.requirement: Security keys shall be securely erased when no longer needed
checks.detection: Check for key material cleanup in deregistration and context release paths
checks.fail_condition: Key material persists in memory after UE deregistration or context release
